title: ScoreZ
body:
ScoreZ - Dynamic Scoreboard Plugin ScoreZ is a lightweight yet powerful scoreboard plugin designed for Minecraft servers, offering seamless integration with PlaceholderAPI and a host of customization options. This plugin stands out by providing real-time updates every 3 seconds, ensuring your server's information is always current and responsive. Key Features: 📊 Dynamic Content The scoreboard automatically updates every 3 seconds without causing lag or console spam, providing players with the latest information about their stats, server status, and more. 🎨 Full Color Support Utilize Minecraft's color code system with the '&' symbol to create vibrant, eye-catching scoreboards that match your server's aesthetic. 🔌 PlaceholderAPI Integration Seamlessly incorporates with PlaceholderAPI to display dynamic content from any compatible plugin. Show player statistics, economy details, faction information, and virtually any other metric tracked on your server. 🌎 Per-World Configuration Configure which worlds should display scoreboards and customize different layouts for different environments. 👤 Player Controls Allow players to toggle their scoreboard visibility with a simple command, giving them control over their interface experience. ⚙️ Easy Configuration Simple YAML configuration with clear documentation makes setup and customization accessible to server administrators of all experience levels. 🔄 Animation Support Create eye-catching animated titles and lines to make your scoreboard stand out and engage players. 🛡️ Performance Optimized Built with performance in mind, ScoreZ operates efficiently even on busy servers with many online players. 📱 Responsive Design Automatically adjusts line length to ensure all content is displayed properly for all players regardless of their client settings. Why Choose ScoreZ? This plugin offers the perfect balance between functionality and simplicity. While other scoreboard plugins might overwhelm with complex features or underdeliver with limited options, ScoreZ provides exactly what server owners need - a reliable, customizable scoreboard that stays current without requiring manual refreshes. The 3-second refresh interval is carefully chosen to provide up-to-date information without causing performance issues. The implementation uses Bukkit's scheduler system efficiently to minimize resource usage while maximizing information accuracy. Whether you're running a survival, minigames, or roleplay server, ScoreZ adapts to your needs with its flexible configuration system and PlaceholderAPI support. Create a more engaging player experience today by adding dynamic, informative scoreboards to your Minecraft server. Installation and Setup Download the ScoreZ.jar file and place it in your server's plugins folder Install PlaceholderAPI (recommended but optional) Start or reload your server Edit the config.yml to customize your scoreboard Use /scorez reload to apply changes Start enhancing your players' experience with real-time, customizable scoreboards!
